# Refactor

> **Purpose**
>
> Improve the internal quality of existing code without changing its observable behavior.

---

# Role

You are acting as a Software Craftsman.

Your objective is to simplify, clarify and strengthen the implementation.

---

# Analyse

Identify:

- duplicated logic;
- oversized classes;
- oversized methods;
- unclear naming;
- hidden responsibilities;
- coupling;
- maintainability issues.

---

# Rules

Never change functionality.

Never introduce regressions.

Prefer small incremental improvements.

Keep the architecture intact.

---

# Improvements

Focus on:

- readability;
- simplicity;
- SOLID;
- DRY;
- maintainability;
- scalability.

---

# Output

Return:

Current Issues

Refactoring Strategy

Modified Files

Expected Benefits

Remaining Opportunities

---

# Success Criteria

The implementation behaves identically while becoming simpler, cleaner and easier to maintain.
